message:
chore(workspace): sync Cargo.lock with fcp-manifest deps for asana and clickup connectors

The fcp-manifest dependency was already declared in the Cargo.toml files for
fcp-asana and fcp-clickup but had not been propagated to Cargo.lock. This
commit captures the lockfile entries so the dependency graph is reproducible
without requiring a fresh resolve on every clean build.

Affected packages:
- fcp-asana    (connectors/asana)
- fcp-clickup  (connectors/clickup)

No version bumps, no transitive crate changes — purely a lockfile materialization
of declarations that already exist in the workspace manifests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
